title: How to apply: Application for a Trust Account Number  - Canada.ca
content:
Application for a Trust Account Number
You can apply for a trust account number using the Trust account registration in My Account , My Business Account , and Represent a Client through the secure portal at Sign in to your CRA account .
You can apply for a trust account number by completing Form T3APP, Application for Trust Account Number . Where you send Form T3APP depends on whether the trust is resident in Canada, or is a non-resident trust or deemed resident trust. Refer to page 3 of the Form T3APP for the mailing instruction.
For more information about the residency of a trust, see Residency and contact information and Income Tax Folio S6-F1-C1, Residence of a Trust or Estate .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
